offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense submissions/week, delayed approvals cause cash flow gaps. We send weekly approval reminders instead of manual tracking and email reminders.
problem: Delayed expense approvals causing cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on expense management
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and weekly reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing expense data
